scan.method: content-verified contract read + authoritative docs cross-check
scan.version_policy: Do not infer version/status from filename alone; require contract contents and authoritative docs.

read_order.role: Token contract source of implementation facts
Authoritative chain address and KGEN role docs

token.name: KLINE GENESIS
token.role: KGEN main token — civilization mass substrate, supply, transfer, AMM tax routing

version_evidence.evidence: Inline banner says `KGEN Token V7.5.2 GENESIS (OZ v5)`.
Contract declaration is `contract KGEN_Token_V7_5_2 is ERC20, Ownable`; used as supporting evidence, not sole source.
Declares `KLINE Odyssey 宇宙唯一主幣（V7.5.2）` and current civilization version `V7.5.2`.
Title and core triad section identify `KGEN Contracts (V7.5.2)` and list `KGEN_Token_V7_5_2.sol` as Token.

role_evidence.evidence: Defines KGEN as the universe's only main token and core energy unit: mass, system fuel, reward share, governance power.
Defines Token as `KGEN 主幣`, responsible for supply, transfer, base permissions, reflux/tax integrations.
ERC20 name/symbol are `KLINE GENESIS` / `KGEN`; tax wallets and AMM-only routing are implemented in `_update`.

status_evidence.evidence: Documents Token Contract address `0xBA3d3810e58735cb6813bC1CDc5458C0d71432Be` and LP Pair address.
Existing KGEN chain deployed address table maps `kgen_token` to the same address.
Existing core triad row marks `kgen_token` as `DEPLOYED` with deployed address ref `kgen_token`.

filename_inference_guard.rule: Filename is not the source of truth for version/status.
filename_inference_guard.result: Filename, inline contract banner, contract declaration, KGEN README, contracts README, and existing civilization indices agree on V7.5.2 / deployed KGEN Token. No version conflict found.

tax_model.trigger: Tax applies only when `from` or `to` is a registered market maker pair and neither side is tax-exempt.
no_tax_cases: Mint, burn, and zero-value transfers pass through without tax branch.
Wallet-to-wallet transfers are no-tax unless one side is a registered AMM pair.
Tax-exempt sender or receiver is no-tax.
invariants: TAX_BPS_BURN + TAX_BPS_BANK + TAX_BPS_REWARD + TAX_BPS_AUTOLP must equal TAX_BPS_TOTAL.
Constructor and setTaxWallets reject zero tax wallet addresses.
New tax wallets are marked tax-exempt when set.

functions.name: setTaxWallets
functions.effect: Updates bankWallet, rewardWallet, autoLPWallet and marks them tax-exempt.

functions.name: setMarketMakerPair
functions.effect: Enables or disables AMM-pair tax trigger addresses.

kgen_layer.meaning: KGEN is the on-chain protocol layer and main token for civilization mass.

contract_layer.meaning: Token is one member of the V7.5.2 core triad.

brain_11520.mechanism: BrainExchange docs and source describe receiving Token rewardWallet 0.05% tax flow.

bank_18888.mechanism: Lingxiao bank docs/source describe possible 0.10% Token tax receiver endpoint.

heart_12345.mechanism: Deploy script wires `heart.setToken(KGEN_TOKEN)`; Heart uses KGEN as its core ERC20 token.

universe_16888.mechanism: 16888 frontend refs include the same KGEN token and LP pair addresses.

mars_108000.mechanism: MarsSeats constructor accepts the KGEN token and receives payroll rewards via Brain.

known_gaps.detail: Contract exposes bankWallet, rewardWallet, and autoLPWallet, but this indexing pass found no authoritative repo document recording the live deployed values.
KGEN/README.md documents the LP pair address, but this indexing pass found no authoritative repo document proving whether setMarketMakerPair(lp_pair, true) has been executed on-chain.
DEPLOYED status is based on authoritative repo docs and existing civilization indices. No external chain explorer or RPC verification was performed in this Phase 1 indexing task.
